## Executive Summary

This report documents all materials explored to create the zihao agent persona. Zihao Ye is an expert in GPU kernel optimization and ML systems, currently an engineer at NVIDIA's AI Compiler group. He is the creator of FlashInfer and a contributor to Apache TVM and Deep Graph Library (DGL).
